name: Drill_Mech

infobox.Systems: Seismic Capacitor(Science)EffectDamage and flip target. If target is killed, crack adjacent tiles.(1 damage)Upgrade I+1 Damage ()Increase damage to the target by 1.Upgrade II+1 Damage ()Increase damage to the target by 1.
infobox.Special: Flying: Flying units can move over any terrain tile.

sections.Team: The mech is available as part of theCataclysmsquad.
sections.Strategy:
The Drill Mech differs from traditional Science-class Mechs, focusing on fulfilling an offensive role rather than a utility one. It's most comparable to the Prime-ClassAegis Mech, but with better movement thanks to its default flight.
Thetile-crackingeffect from Seismic Capacitor triggers upon killing a unit, and this effect is central to the Cataclysm squad's tactics. Thus, at least the first+1 damage() upgrade should be prioritized. Additionally, the Drill Mech also benefits from a pilot with the Adrenalineskill, preferably a pilot that offers theBoostedstatus as well. Morgan LeJeune is a good pick, as he gains boosted on kill, allowing for easy combos and cracked tiles, provided one kill can be acquired to activate the boost. ThePitcher Mechcan then be used to throw other grounded enemies into cracked tiles to immediately dispose of them, and theTriptych Mechcan use its multi-hit weapon to crack and push enemies into chasms at the same time.
Be warned, the tile-cracking effect will destroy aTime Pod. Cracked tiles will also cause the train in train levels to immediately damage itself if it were to run over one, as its movement counts as an attack and will therefore create chasm, 'killing' the front half of the locomotive.
Should the Drill Mech not kill its target, the flipping effect can be occasionally useful at preventing enemies with large threat ranges from hitting their targets; examples includingAlpha HornetsandCentipedes. However, flipping won't be of any help against enemies that attack multiple targets, such asDiggers.
sections.Trivia: - The Drill Mech is featured in the cover art of theadvanced edition soundtrack by Ben Pruntyalongside the Pitcher Mech. The Album Art was made byPedro Medeiros, also known for art on the video games Celeste and Tower Fall.
sections.Gallery: - Cover of theadvanced edition soundtrack by Ben Prunty, album art byPedro Medeiros.

Team

Cataclysm
squad.
Strategy
[
]
The Drill Mech differs from traditional Science-class Mechs, focusing on fulfilling an offensive role rather than a utility one. It's most comparable to the Prime-Class
Aegis Mech
, but with better movement thanks to its default flight.
The
tile-cracking
effect from Seismic Capacitor triggers upon killing a unit, and this effect is central to the Cataclysm squad's tactics. Thus, at least the first
+1 damage
(
) upgrade should be prioritized. Additionally, the Drill Mech also benefits from a pilot with the Adrenaline
skill
, preferably a pilot that offers the
Boosted
status as well. Morgan LeJeune is a good pick, as he gains boosted on kill, allowing for easy combos and cracked tiles, provided one kill can be acquired to activate the boost. The
Pitcher Mech
can then be used to throw other grounded enemies into cracked tiles to immediately dispose of them, and the
Triptych Mech
can use its multi-hit weapon to crack and push enemies into chasms at the same time.
Be warned, the tile-cracking effect will destroy a
Time Pod
. Cracked tiles will also cause the train in train levels to immediately damage itself if it were to run over one, as its movement counts as an attack and will therefore create chasm, 'killing' the front half of the locomotive.
Should the Drill Mech not kill its target, the flipping effect can be occasionally useful at preventing enemies with large threat ranges from hitting their targets; examples including
Alpha Hornets
and
Centipedes
. However, flipping won't be of any help against enemies that attack multiple targets, such as
Diggers
.
Trivia
[
]
The Drill Mech is featured in the cover art of the
advanced edition soundtrack by Ben Prunty
alongside the Pitcher Mech. The Album Art was made by
Pedro Medeiros
, also known for art on the video games Celeste and Tower Fall.
